title: hieracium catognense
side_effects: Hieracium catognense can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to kidney damage and increased risk of bleeding. In some cases, it may interact with other medications, resulting in adverse reactions like headaches and dizziness. Furthermore, using Hieracium catognense without proper medical guidance can exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as hypertension and liver disease.
